salary_details.details: Salary: Rs. 67700 - 208700 Per Month plus allowances

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for SGMH Delhi Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Senior Resident posts at SGMH Delhi is scheduled for 02 July 2026. Candidates should ensure they report on this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Resident post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 58 vacancies announced for the Senior Resident positions at Sanjay Gandhi Memorial Hospital.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Senior Resident post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required is MBBS with a P.G. Degree/Diploma/DNB in the concerned specialty from a recognized University/Institution, and registration with the Delhi Medical Council (DMC) or proof of application.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applying to the Senior Resident posts is 45 years, with age relaxations applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Senior Resident positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary in the range of Rs. 67700 to Rs. 208700 per month, plus allowances.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the SGMH Delhi Senior Resident recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Senior Resident posts will be based on a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at Sanjay Gandhi Memorial Hospital, Delhi. The exact venue details are usually provided in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of these documents, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or ad-hoc job?
faq.answer: The job type for these Senior Resident positions is Ad-hoc.
